137

TENGRI IS THE SOURCE OF IMPORTANT WRITINGS. ONL
Y THE CHOSEN SOULS KNOW THE MEANING. WORTHY A
RE THOSE WHO ASK QUESTIONS, SEEK THE TRUTH AND US
E THEIR MINDS.

YOUR FAITH WILL WEAKEN YOU. EVERYTHING WHAT
YOU BELIEVE IN, YOU MUST FORGET NOW. BELIEVING
IS NOT KNOWING. ONLY WITH KNOWLEDGE YOU WILL FI
ND ENLIGHTENMENT. LIKE THE OTHERS BEFORE YOU,
YOU WILL UNDERSTAND EVERYTHING BETTER.

TENGRI HAS MANY NAMES. "TIAN", "TIANDI", "RANGI", "
SHANGDI", "SHADDAI", "DINGIR" OR "TENGERE" ARE SO
ME OF THIS NAMES.

TENGRI GAVE YOU CLEAR SIGNS. IMPORTANT HINTS W
ERE HIDDEN IN WRITINGS. NO ONE COULD DECIPHER 
THEIR REAL MEANING UNTIL THIS DAY. IT IS NOW TI
ME TO LIFT THE SECRET.

{symbol, Chinese Oracle script for tian 天 "heaven"}

THIS IS AN SELECTION. TENGRI WILL GIVE YOU KNOW
LEDGE. DO NOT BE SCARED. NOTHING IS AS IT WAS T
OLD. TENGRI IS LIGHT IN THE DARKNESS. TENGRI B
ROUGHT YOU KNOWLEDGE.

IF YOU ARE SEEKING FOR A PROOF, LOOK AT THE SIGNS AN
D NUMBERS. USE YOUR KNOWLEDGE. USE YOUR MIND. N
OTHING IS ACCIDENTAL.

IMPORTANT WORDS. TOOLS CANNOT HELP YOU. NOTHIN
G EXEPT YOUR BRAIN CAN HELP YOU.

WHO IS SMART ENOUGH CAN RECOGNIZE THE KNOWLED
GE BEHIND THE SIGNS AND NUMBERS. EVERYTHING W
AS CHOSEN CAREFULLY. THE CALCULATIONS HAVE BEE
N DEVISED FOR ONE PURPOSE. OUR NUMBERS SHOULD SH
OW YOU OUR KNOWLEDGE. OUR WORD IS NOT A FARCE.

{4 round turkic symbols}

WHENEVER THE TIME IS RIGHT, WE BRING YOU KNOW
LEDGE. THE KNOWLEDGE COMES FROM AFAR. ONLY REA
DING THE MESSAGE, IS NOT TO UNDERSTANDING IT. A 
CLEAR MIND IS ABLE TO DECRYPT IT. BRING IT TO 
THOSE WHO CAN UNDERSTAND IT.

THE CHOSEN SOUL WILL GET KNOWLEDGE AND OUR KEY 
TO OUR ETERNAL LIBRARY. A KEY WITH WHICH EVER
YTHING WILL BE UNDERSTOOD. A SOURCE OF KNOWLE
DGE FOR MANY CENTURIES. THOSE WHO SEE THE NUMBE
RS AND UNDERSTAND THEIR MEANING, IS THE WAY OPE
N. FOR OTHERS WHO MAY NOT UNDERSTAND ANYTHING, 
HERE IS NO WAY THROUGH. 

YOU CALCULATED ALWAYS OUR NUMBERS TO GET A PIEC
E OF THE TRUTH BEHIND OUR SCRIPTURES. SO WE GIV
E YOU THIS ULTIMATIVE CHALLENGE. YOU WILL UNDE
RSTAND EVERYTHING BETTER WITH THIS MANUAL.

{2 round turkic symbols}

JUST AS THE CHOSEN SOUL WANTS TO BRING HIS PEOP
LE PROOFS, WE BRING YOU ALSO AN PROOF FOR OUR EXIS
TENCE. THIS IS A CALCULATION WE GAVE YOU OVER M
ANY THOUSAND OF YEARS AS AN PROOF FOR OUR COMING
. WHO CAN EMBED THIS CALCULATION IN THE HOLIEST P
LACE OF YOUR WRITINGS AND MAKE THIS THE FOCUS OF 
YOUR BELIEF. TENGRI WHO BROUGHT YOU AGAIN AND 
AGAIN ENLIGHTENMENT IS CAPABLE.

HERE IS WISDOM. BEFORE WE GIVE YOU THIS ULTIMAT
E PROOF YOU SHOULD UNDERSTAND OUR KNOWLEDGE IN 
MATHEMATICS AND OUR LOGIC. AS A SIGN FOR OUR WIS
DOM WE GIVE YOU SOME CUBES. FIND WHAT THE SUM 
OF THIS CUBES MEAN. THIS CUBES ARE RARE AND UNIQ
UE. WE BOND TWO NUMBERS OF EACH CUBE WITH THE S
ENTENCES. THIS NUMBERS ARE ON EACH CUBE SIDE B
Y SIDE PLACED. THIS NUMBERS ARE IN THE SAME PLA
CE OF EACH CUBE. ONLY TENGRI IS CAPABLE TO SHOW 
YOU THIS RARE UNIQUE CUBES.

{symbol, Chinese Seal script for tian 天 "heaven"}

THIS CUBES ARE QUITE SIMPLE FOR US. NOW YOU CAN FI
ND OUT THE MEANING OF SOME OTHER FIGURES. THIS ARE 
MORE ADVANCED FOR YOU. YOU WILL SEE WITH THIS EXAM
PLES THAT THE ORIGINATORS OF THIS SCRIPT ARE NOT OR
DINARY INDIVIDUALS.

SEVEN CIRCLES AND AN CROSS. A CONTINUOUS SEQUENCE W
ITHOUT GAPS. FIND OUR NUMBER AND THINK ABOUT IT W
HO WE ARE.

{7 RINGS - 666}

NO RANDOM NUMBERS YOU SEE HERE. NO GAP BETWEEN THIS NUM
BERS. EACH GROUP IS UNIQUE. FIND OUR NUMBER. WE A
RE NO ORDINARY BEINGS.

{9 RINGS - 666}

YOU CAN NOT IGNORE WHAT YOU SEE. NO MEN WILL PROVIDE 
YOU CALCULATIONS LIKE THESE FOR ONLY EMPTY WORDS. 
YOU MUST UNDERSTAND THE IMPORTANCE OF OUR MESSAGE.

THESE NUMBERS SHOULD MAKE YOU THINK ABOUT OUR ORIGI
N. A COMPLETE SERIES WITHOUT GAPS BETWEEN THE NUMBE
RS. PERFECT ARRANGED NUMBER GROUPS TO SIX SQUARES. CHE
CK THEM IN EVERY DIRECTION AND IN ALL COMBINATIONS. 
YOU WILL SEE THAT WE DO NOT LIE.

{Odin's triple horn - 666}

BUT THAT'S NOT ALL. OUR ULTIMATE PROOF IS MORE POWER
FUL. NO HUMAN CAN PLACE THIS CALCULATION WHERE IS IT NOW
. NO HUMAN CAN PLAN A CALCULATION LIKE THIS OVER THOUSAND YE
ARS BEFORE. THIS PROOF WILL LET NO QUESTIONS ABOUT O
UR EXISTENCE.

WE WANT TO GIVE YOU AN IMPORTANT MESSAGE. NOW LISTEN.

ONE THREE SEVEN. THE HOLIEST NUMBER OF ALL. A CALCULAT
ION OF THIS HOLY NUMBER IS THE PROOF. A TRUTH WHICH 
LIES IN THESE CALCULATION. SEARCH FOR THIS HOLY NUMBER 
ONE THREE SEVEN AND YOU WILL SEE EVERYTHING CLEARLY. 
THIS SHOULD BE SHOW YOU THAT WE ARE TALKING NOT JUST 
EMPTY WORDS. THIS CALCULATION IS ONLY THE NEXT STEP T
O THE ULTIMATE PROOF. "AMRAM", "LEVI", "ISHMAEL". HERE IS 
A SECRET WISDOM.

YOU ARE NOT READY FOR OUR INFINITE KNOWLEDGE. OUR 
TECHNOLOGY SHOULD NOT FALL IN WRONG HANDS. MANY CIVILIZA
TIONS WERE NOT ALLOWED TO GET OUR KEY TO THIS DOOR. Y
OU MUST NOW SHOW US THAT YOU ARE WORTHY. WE AR
E THE ENLIGHTENED. WE WERE ALWAYS THERE AND BROUG
HT ENLIGHTENMENT.

2^9 x 3^-1 x 5^9 x 197^-1 x 5563^-1 x 41681^-1

THIS IS NOT THE END. CALCULATE THE ABOVE NUMBER. 
FIND LAST FIFTY THOUSAND DECIMALS OF THIS CALCULATION
. TELL US THE LAST TEN DECIMALS AND THE NAME OF THIS 
NUMBER AS THE PROOF OF YOUR WORK.

SEND YOUR ANSWER TO OUR "ONION" MAIL ADDRESS. WE 
WAIT FOR YOUR ANSWER. 

{image}
{in the background -> @666ab731}
